name: Teranga Gold Corporation
description: Teranga Gold Corporation was a Canadian-based gold mining company focused on the production, development, and exploration of gold properties in West Africa, specifically in Senegal and Burkina Faso. The company was established in 2010 to acquire the Sabodala gold mine and expanded its portfolio through strategic growth and exploration. Teranga Gold Corporation operated as a publicly traded entity on the Toronto Stock Exchange until it was acquired by Endeavour Mining in February 2021, a move designed to create a leading senior gold producer with a significant footprint in the West African region.
